---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue
What documentation is missing, incorrect, or unclear?

## Type of Documentation
- [ ] API Reference
- [ ] Getting Started Guide  
- [ ] Installation Instructions
- [ ] CLI Command Reference
- [ ] Architecture Documentation
- [ ] Examples/Tutorials
- [ ] README
- [ ] Code Comments
- [ ] Error Messages
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Current State
Describe what exists currently (if anything).

## What's Needed
Describe what documentation should be added or how existing docs should be improved.

## Target Audience
Who would benefit from this documentation?
- [ ] New users trying Memora for the first time
- [ ] Developers integrating Memora into applications
- [ ] Contributors wanting to modify Memora
- [ ] Advanced users needing API reference
- [ ] System administrators deploying Memora

## Suggested Location
Where should this documentation live?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] docs/ folder
- [ ] Code docstrings
- [ ] CLI help text
- [ ] Error messages
- [ ] Website/GitHub Pages
- [ ] Examples folder

## Additional Context
- Are there any examples or references that would be helpful?
- Is this blocking you from accomplishing something specific?
